km.England: ប្រទេសអង់គ្លេស

zh.lifeSummary: Roger De Washbourne於1190年出生在英國。他和Joan De Wasseborne至少有1個女兒。他去世於1231年享年41歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Roger De Washbourne于1190年出生在英国。他和Joan De Wasseborne至少有1个女儿。他去世于1231年享年41岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Washbourne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Great and Little Washbourne (Gloucs) or Washbourne in Halwell (Devon). The variant Washburn could also be from Washburn (WR Yorks), but there is comparatively little evidence that this place yielded a surname.

variants.name: Washburn
meanings: English: habitational name from Great and Little Washbourne (Gloucestershire), or Washbourne in Halwell (Devon). The Gloucestershire placename derives from Old English wæsse (genitive wæssan) ‘wet place, swamp, marsh’ + burna ‘spring, stream’. The Devon placename derives from Old English wæsce ‘place for washing’ + burna.
History: John Washburn came to MA in 1626 and settled in Duxbury, MA, in 1632.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: Roger De Washbourne was born in 1190, in England. He had at least 1 daughter with Joan De Wasseborne. He died in 1231, at the age of 41.

fr.lifeSummary: Roger De Washbourne est né en 1190, à Angleterre. Il a eu au moins 1 fille avec Joan De Wasseborne. Il est décédé en 1231, à l’âge de 41 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Roger De Washbourne wurde 1190 in England geboren. Er hatte mit Joan De Wasseborne mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1231 im Alter von 41 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Roger De Washbourne è nato il nel 1190 nel England. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia con Joan De Wasseborne. Morì nel 1231, all'età di 41 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger De Washbourneは1190年にイギリスで生まれた。彼はJoan De Wasseborneとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1231年に41歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger De Washbourne(은)는 1190년 영국에서 태어났다. 그는 Joan De Wasseborne(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1231년 41세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Roger De Washbourne nasceu em 1190, em Inglaterra. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha com Joan De Wasseborne. Ele faleceu em 1231, com 41 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Roger De Washbourne родился в 1190 г. в местности Англия. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Joan De Wasseborne. Он умер в 1231 г. в возрасте 41 год.

es.lifeSummary: Roger De Washbourne nació en 1190, en Inglaterra. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Joan De Wasseborne. Murió en 1231, a la edad de 41 años.
